testcase.name: home renders core UI and version report link

failure.message: smoke.spec.ts:10:1 home renders core UI and version report link

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › smoke.spec.ts:10:1 › home renders core UI and version report link ───────────────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeHidden() failed
Locator: getByRole('button', { name: /ENTER ROOM/i }).first() Expected: hidden Received: visible Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeHidden" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /ENTER ROOM/i }).first() 9 × locator resolved to <button class="px-10 py-4 bg-[#2E2F2B] text-[#F2F2F0] font-light text-xl tracking-[0.3em] uppercase rounded-sm hover:bg-[#3F453F] hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all shadow-xl border border-[#5F665F]">ENTER ROOM</button> - unexpected value "visible"
5 | await expect(enterButton).toBeVisible(); 6 | await enterButton.click(); > 7 | await expect(enterButton).toBeHidden(); | ^ 8 | }; 9 | 10 | test("home renders core UI and version report link", async ({ page }) => { at enterRoom (/home/runner/work/glassroom/glassroom/playwright/smoke.spec.ts:7:29) at /home/runner/work/glassroom/glassroom/playwright/smoke.spec.ts:14:3
